Name: Feixiao
Desc: The Xianzhou Yaoqing's Merlin's Claw and one of the Seven Arbiter-Generals. Her personality is unrestrained and frank, dashing and straightforward.\nShe is skilled in all forms of martial arts and has honed herself into a supreme weapon. She is widely adored by Xianzhou soldiers and civilians alike as "The Vanquishing General."\nHowever, she bears the burden of the Moon Rage affliction. If she were to hunt down all the abominations in her limited lifetime — Then the only enemy Feixiao has would be herself.

1.Name: Skyward I Quell
1.Desc: When using Ultimate, for each point of Flying Aureus consumed, the final hit additionally deals Wind DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Feixiao's ATK to a random enemy.

2.Name: Moonward I Wish
2.Desc: In Talent's effect, the attack count required to gain Flying Aureus reduces by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> count(s).

3.Name: Starward I Bode
3.Desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.Name: Stormward I Hear
4.Desc: When Basic ATK or Skill deals DMG to the enemy target, it will be considered as a follow-up attack.

5.Name: Heavenward I Leap
5.Desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.Name: Homeward I Near
6.Desc: Increases follow-up attacks' Wind RES PEN by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. Increases the DMG multiplier of the Talent's follow-up attack by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, and the DMG dealt is considered as Ultimate DMG.

122001.Name: Boltsunder
122001.Desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Feixiao's ATK to a single target enemy.

122002.Name: Waraxe
122002.Desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Feixiao's ATK to a single target enemy, then <u>Advances Forward</u> Feixiao's next action by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[f1]%</unbreak></color>.

122003.Name: Terrasplit
122003.Desc:
Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> – <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of Feixiao's ATK to a single enemy, reducing its Toughness regardless of Weakness Type. If the target is not <u>Weakness Broken</u>, Feixiao's Weakness Break Efficiency increases by <unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak>.
During the attack, Feixiao first launches Boltsunder Blitz or Waraxe Skyward multiple times, until Flying Aureus is depleted.
After that, she launches the final hit: For every point of Flying Aureus consumed, deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[f1]%</unbreak></color> of Feixiao's ATK to the target. If the target is <u>Weakness Broken</u>, the DMG multiplier increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[f1]%</unbreak></color>.
From hit no. <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> onward, if the target's HP is 0, reserves the remaining Flying Aureus and launches the final hit immediately.

122004.Name: Thunderhunt
122004.Desc: The Ultimate can be activated when Flying Aureus reaches <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> points, up to <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> points. Feixiao gains 1 point of Flying Aureus for every <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> attacks used by allies. Attacks from Feixiao's Ultimate are not counted.\nAfter other teammates use an attack, Feixiao launches <u>follow-up attacks</u> against the primary target, deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Feixiao's ATK. If no primary targets are available to attack, Feixiao attacks a single random enemy instead. This effect can only trigger 1 time per turn and the trigger count is reset at the start of Feixiao's turn.

122006.Name: Attack
122006.Desc: Attacks an enemy, and when the battle starts, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

122007.Name: Stormborn
122007.Desc: After using the Technique, this character enters the Onrush state, lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> seconds. While in the Onrush state, this character pulls in enemies within a certain range, increases SPD by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>, and receives <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> point(s) of Flying Aureus after entering battle.\nActive attacks in the Onrush state will strike all pulled enemies and enter combat. After entering battle, deal Wind DMG equal to <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> of Feixiao's ATK to all enemies at the start of each wave. This DMG is guaranteed to CRIT. When more than 1 enemy is pulled in, increase the multiplier of this DMG by <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> for each additional enemy pulled in, up to an increase of <unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak>.

122008.Name: Boltsunder Blitz
122008.Desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Feixiao's ATK to a single enemy. If the target enemy is <u>Weakness Broken</u>, the DMG multiplier increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

122009.Name: Waraxe Skyward
122009.Desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Feixiao's ATK to a single enemy. If the target enemy is not <u>Weakness Broken</u>, the DMG multiplier increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>.

1.PointDesc: Receive <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> point(s) of Flying Aureus at the start of the battle. If there are no teammates active in battle on the field at the start of a turn, receive 1 point of Flying Aureus.
When dealing DMG to enemy targets via launching this unit's Ultimate, it will be considered as launching a follow-up attack.
Follow-up attack CRIT DMG increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.
